description:
GCP Postgres (Cloud SQL + Private Service Connect) registration data: the handles by
which a setup-created Cloud SQL instance and its PSC consumer endpoint are registered
as a Frozen Postgres resource. Setup owns the instance, Alien refreshes and heartbeats it.

endpointIp.description: PSC consumer endpoint IP (the binding host).

passwordSecretName.description: Secret Manager secret name of the master password (never the password).

pscAddressName.description: Regional internal address backing the PSC consumer endpoint.

pscForwardingRuleName.description: Regional forwarding rule for the PSC consumer endpoint.

pscServiceAttachment.description: PSC service-attachment URI exposed by the instance.
